revision.comment: no border for non-square navy flag (TPER)
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = West Germany | flag alias = Flag of Germany.svg | flag alias-state = Flag of Germany (state).svg | flag alias-naval = Naval ensign of Germany.svg | link alias-naval = German Navy | flag alias-air force =Flag of Germany (state).svg | link alias-air force = German Air Force | flag alias-army = Colour of Germany.svg | link alias-army = German Army | flag alias-navy = Naval ensign of Germany.svg | link alias-navy = German Navy | border-naval = | border-navy = | link alias-football = Germany {{{mw|}}} {{#ifeq:{{{mw|}}}|Olympic||national}} {{{age|}}} football {{{class|}}} team | link alias-field hockey = Germany {{{mw|}}} national {{{age|}}} field hockey team | link alias-tennis = Germany {{{mw}}} Cup team | link alias-basketball = Germany {{{mw|}}} national {{{age|}}} basketball team | link alias-rugby union = Germany {{{mw|}}} national {{{age|}}} rugby union team | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = state | redir1 = FRG | related1 = Germany | related2 = East Germany </noinclude> }}<noinclude> </noinclude>

{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = West Germany | flag alias = Flag of Germany.svg | flag alias-state = Flag of Germany (state).svg | flag alias-naval = Naval ensign of Germany.svg | link alias-naval = German Navy | flag alias-air force =Flag of Germany (state).svg | link alias-air force = German Air Force | flag alias-army = Colour of Germany.svg | link alias-army = German Army | flag alias-navy = Naval ensign of Germany.svg | link alias-navy = German Navy | border-naval = | border-navy = | link alias-football = Germany {{{mw|}}} {{#ifeq:{{{mw|}}}|Olympic||national}} {{{age|}}} football {{{class|}}} team | link alias-field hockey = Germany {{{mw|}}} national {{{age|}}} field hockey team | link alias-tennis = Germany {{{mw}}} Cup team | link alias-basketball = Germany {{{mw|}}} national {{{age|}}} basketball team | link alias-rugby union = Germany {{{mw|}}} national {{{age|}}} rugby union team | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = state | redir1 = FRG | related1 = Germany | related2 = East Germany </noinclude> }}<noinclude> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = West Germany | flag alias = Flag of Germany.svg | flag alias-state = Flag of Germany (state).svg | flag alias-naval = Naval ensign of Germany.svg | link alias-naval = German Navy | flag alias-air force =Flag of Germany (state).svg | link alias-air force = German Air Force | flag alias-army = Colour of Germany.svg | link alias-army = German Army | flag alias-navy = Naval ensign of Germany.svg | link alias-navy = German Navy | border-naval = | border-navy = | link alias-football = Germany {{{mw|}}} {{#ifeq:{{{mw|}}}|Olympic||national}} {{{age|}}} football {{{class|}}} team | link alias-field hockey = Germany {{{mw|}}} national {{{age|}}} field hockey team | link alias-tennis = Germany {{{mw}}} Cup team | link alias-basketball = Germany {{{mw|}}} national {{{age|}}} basketball team | link alias-rugby union = Germany {{{mw|}}} national {{{age|}}} rugby union team | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = state | redir1 = FRG | related1 = Germany | related2 = East Germany </noinclude> }}<noinclude> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_West_Germany here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_West_Germany for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = West Germany | flag alias = Flag of Germany.svg | flag alias-state = Flag of Germany (state).svg | flag alias-naval = Naval ensign of Germany.svg | link alias-naval = German Navy | flag alias-air force =Flag of Germany (state).svg | link alias-air force = German Air Force | flag alias-army = Colour of Germany.svg | link alias-army = German Army | flag alias-navy = Naval ensign of Germany.svg | link alias-navy = German Navy | border-naval = | border-navy = | link alias-football = Germany {{{mw|}}} {{#ifeq:{{{mw|}}}|Olympic||national}} {{{age|}}} football {{{class|}}} team | link alias-field hockey = Germany {{{mw|}}} national {{{age|}}} field hockey team | link alias-tennis = Germany {{{mw}}} Cup team | link alias-basketball = Germany {{{mw|}}} national {{{age|}}} basketball team | link alias-rugby union = Germany {{{mw|}}} national {{{age|}}} rugby union team | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = state | redir1 = FRG | related1 = Germany | related2 = East Germany </noinclude> }}<noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
